title: Door Knocker (Forge)
description: A simple mod that adds the ability to knock on doors and trapdoors.
body:
Door Knocker (Forge) is an unofficial forge port of the Door Knocker Fabric mod by MeowMC.

  

This mod adds one thing to the game:

The ability to knock on doors and trapdoors.

This can really improve immersion for role playing users and can also just be a nice thing to have when playing with friends!

 

Original project: https://github.com/MeowMC/Door-Knocker

Ported from: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/door-knocker

 

Known Issues:
Any help with these issues via PR would be extremely welcome.
- Can be spammed (needs a cooldown)
- Occurs at the end of breaking a door (Either the cooldown or a change in the event type would fix this issue)
- Occurs when breaking a door (maybe only activate if the button has been held down for less than a certain period of time)
